items.name: Pyrope
items.description: Pyrope is a high-performance, adaptive Vector Database built as an extension of Microsoft Garnet. It features a unique dual-plane architecture: a blazing fast C# core handling RESP-compatible vector operations, and a Python-based AI Sidecar that acts as a "brain" to optimize system behavior.
